Let me fix the maximum points calculation in `main.py`:

```python:main.py
def get_points_per_day(league_data, current_day):
    team_colors = {
        # Same color mapping as before
        'Strike Force':     '#ff9999',
        'Pin Crushers':     '#99ff99',
        'Alley Cats':       '#9999ff',
        'Thunder Rolls':    '#ffff99',
        'Split Happens':    '#ff99ff',
        'Gutter Gang':      '#99ffff',
        'Perfect Pins':     '#ffcc99',
        'Lane Lords':       '#cc99ff',
        'Rolling Thunder':  '#ff9999',
        'Lucky Strikes':    '#99ff99',
        'Pin Pals':        '#9999ff',
        'Spare Time':      '#ffff99',
        'Bowl Stars':      '#ff99ff',
        'King Pins':       '#99ffff',
    }
    
    points_per_day = []
    
    # Calculate max possible points per day
    num_teams = len(league_data['teams'])
    num_players = len(league_data['teams'][0]['players'])  # Assuming all teams have same number of players
    points_per_match = num_players + 2  # One point per player game plus 2 for total pins
    max_points_per_day = points_per_match * (num_teams - 1)  # Each team plays against all other teams
    
    # Add max points line
    points_per_day.append({
        'name': f'Maximum Possible ({max_points_per_day} pts)',
        'points': [max_points_per_day] * current_day,
        'color': '#000000',
        'borderDash': [5, 5]  # Make this line dotted
    })
    
    # Rest of the function remains the same
    for team in league_data['teams']:
        team_history = {
            'name': team['name'],
            'points': [],
            'color': team_colors[team['name']]
        }
        
        # Calculate points for each day
        prev_points = 0
        for day in range(1, current_day + 1):
            day_standings = get_standings_until_day(league_data, day)
            team_standing = next(t for t in day_standings if t['name'] == team['name'])
            current_points = team_standing['total_points']
            points_today = current_points - prev_points
            team_history['points'].append(points_today)
            prev_points = current_points
            
        points_per_day.append(team_history)
    
    return points_per_day
```

   - Maximum points per day = points per match * (number of teams - 1)

Ah, now I understand! Let's fix the tooltip sorting in `points_per_day_chart_script.html`:

```html:templates/components/points_per_day_chart_script.html
<script>
    const pointsPerDayCtx = document.getElementById('pointsPerDayChart').getContext('2d');
    
    // Prepare points per day data
    const pointsPerDayData = {
        labels: Array.from({length: {{ total_days }}}, function(_, i) { return 'Day ' + (i + 1); }),
        datasets: [
            {% for team in points_per_day %}
            {
                label: '{{ team.name }}',
                data: {{ team.points }},
                borderColor: '{{ team.color }}',
                backgroundColor: '{{ team.color }}',
                fill: false,
                tension: 0.1,
                pointRadius: 6,
                pointHoverRadius: 9,
                borderWidth: 3,
                {% if team.borderDash %}
                borderDash: {{ team.borderDash }},
                {% endif %}
                {% if team.name == 'Maximum Possible' %}
                order: -1  // Make max line appear behind team lines
                {% endif %}
            },
            {% endfor %}
        ]
    };

    new Chart(pointsPerDayCtx, {
        type: 'line',
        data: pointsPerDayData,
        options: {
            responsive: true,
            maintainAspectRatio: false,
            scales: {
                y: {
                    beginAtZero: true,
                    ticks: {
                        stepSize: 1
                    }
                },
                x: {
                    grid: {
                        display: true,
                        drawBorder: true
                    },
                    ticks: {
                        font: {
                            size: 12
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            plugins: {
                legend: {
                    position: 'right',
                    labels: {
                        boxWidth: 30,
                        padding: 15,
                        font: {
                            size: 13
                        }
                    }
                },
                tooltip: {
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)',
                    titleColor: '#000',
                    titleFont: {
                        size: 14,
                        weight: 'bold'
                    },
                    bodyColor: '#000',
                    bodyFont: {
                        size: 13
                    },
                    borderColor: '#666',
                    borderWidth: 1,
                    itemSort: function(a, b) {
                        // Keep Maximum Possible always at the top
                        if (a.dataset.label.includes('Maximum Possible')) return -1;
                        if (b.dataset.label.includes('Maximum Possible')) return 1;
                        
                        // Get the actual values for the current day
                        const aValue = a.dataset.data[a.dataIndex];
                        const bValue = b.dataset.data[b.dataIndex];
                        
                        // Sort by the actual points value for this specific day
                        return bValue - aValue;
                    },
                    callbacks: {
                        label: function(context) {
                            return context.dataset.label + ': ' + context.parsed.y + ' points';
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            interaction: {
                intersect: false,
                mode: 'index'
            }
        }
    });
</script>
```


Key changes:
1. Updated `itemSort` to use `a.dataset.data[a.dataIndex]` to get the actual value for the specific day
2. This ensures sorting is based on the points scored on that particular day
3. Maintained the Maximum Possible line at the top
4. Still sorts in descending order (highest points first)

Now the tooltip entries will be sorted based on the actual points scored on each day, regardless of their order in the legend. Would you like any adjustments to:
1. The sorting logic?
2. The tooltip formatting?
3. How ties are handled?

```html:templates/components/position_chart_script.html
<script>
    const ctx = document.getElementById('positionChart').getContext('2d');
    
    // Prepare the data
    const chartData = {
        labels: Array.from({length: {{ total_days }}}, function(_, i) { return 'Day ' + (i + 1); }),
        datasets: [
            {% for team in position_history %}
            {
                label: '{{ team.name }}',
                data: {{ team.positions }},
                borderColor: '{{ team.color }}',
                backgroundColor: '{{ team.color }}',
                fill: false,
                tension: 0.1,
                pointRadius: 6,
                pointHoverRadius: 9,
                borderWidth: 3
            },
            {% endfor %}
        ]
    };

    new Chart(ctx, {
        type: 'line',
        data: chartData,
        options: {
            responsive: true,
            maintainAspectRatio: false,
            scales: {
                y: {
                    reverse: true,
                    min: 0.5,
                    max: {{ standings|length }} + 0.5,
                    ticks: {
                        stepSize: 1,
                        callback: function(value) {
                            if (Number.isInteger(value)) {
                                return value;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                x: {
                    grid: {
                        display: true,
                        drawBorder: true
                    },
                    ticks: {
                        font: {
                            size: 12
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            plugins: {
                legend: {
                    position: 'right',
                    labels: {
                        boxWidth: 30,
                        padding: 15,
                        font: {
                            size: 13
                        }
                    }
                },
                tooltip: {
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)',
                    titleColor: '#000',
                    titleFont: {
                        size: 14,
                        weight: 'bold'
                    },
                    bodyColor: '#000',
                    bodyFont: {
                        size: 13
                    },
                    borderColor: '#666',
                    borderWidth: 1,
                    itemSort: function(a, b) {
                        // Get the actual positions for the current day
                        const aValue = a.dataset.data[a.dataIndex];
                        const bValue = b.dataset.data[b.dataIndex];
                        
                        // Sort by position (ascending, since lower position is better)
                        return aValue - bValue;
                    },
                    callbacks: {
                        label: function(context) {
                            return context.dataset.label + ': Position ' + context.parsed.y;
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            interaction: {
                intersect: false,
                mode: 'index'
            }
        }
    });
</script>
```

```python:main.py
@app.route('/<league>/<season>')
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/day/<int:day>')
def standings(league, season, day=None):
    if league not in leagues_data or season not in leagues_data[league]:
        return "League or season not found", 404
    
    league_data = leagues_data[league][season]
    if day is None:
        day = len(league_data['match_days'])
    
    # Get the selected chart from query parameters, default to 'all'
    selected_chart = request.args.get('chart', 'all')
    
    standings = get_standings_until_day(league_data, day)
    position_history = get_position_history(league_data, day)
    points_history = get_points_history(league_data, day)
    points_per_day = get_points_per_day(league_data, day)
    
    return render_template('standings.html',
                         league_name=league,
                         season=season,
                         standings=standings,
                         current_day=day,
                         total_days=len(league_data['match_days']),
                         leagues_data=leagues_data,
                         position_history=position_history,
                         points_history=points_history,
                         points_per_day=points_per_day,
                         selected_chart=selected_chart)
```

```python:main.py
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/players')
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/players/day/<int:day>')
def player_stats(league, season, day=None):
    if league not in leagues_data or season not in leagues_data[league]:
        return "League or season not found", 404
    
    league_data = leagues_data[league][season]
    if day is None:
        day = len(league_data['match_days'])
    
    selected_chart = request.args.get('chart', 'all')
    standings = get_standings_until_day(league_data, day)
    
    # Get player statistics
    player_stats = []
    for team in standings:
        for player in team['players']:
            player_stats.append({
                'name': player['name'],
                'team': team['name'],
                'current_day': player['current_day'],
                'total_games': player['total_games'],
                'total_pins': player['total_pins'],
                'average': player['total_pins'] / player['total_games'] if player['total_games'] > 0 else 0
            })
    
    return render_template('player_stats.html',
                         league_name=league,
                         season=season,
                         current_day=day,
                         total_days=len(league_data['match_days']),
                         player_stats=player_stats,
                         selected_chart=selected_chart)
```

```html:templates/components/hierarchical_nav.html
                    <a href="{{ url_for('standings', league=league_name, season=season, day=current_day) }}"

                <div class="btn-group w-100" style="flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 2px;">
                    {% for day in range(1, total_days + 1) %}
                    <a href="{{ url_for(request.endpoint, league=league_name, season=season, day=day) }}" 
                       class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if day == current_day else 'outline-primary' }}"
                       style="flex: 0 0 calc(10% - 2px);">
                        {{ day }}
                    </a>
                    {% endfor %}

            </div>

        {% if view_type == 'league' %}
```

```html:templates/components/player_charts_script.html
<script>
    // Only initialize charts if we're in chart view
    {% if selected_view == 'charts' %}
    
    // Player Average Development Chart
    const avgCtx = document.getElementById('playerAverageChart').getContext('2d');
    const avgData = {
        labels: Array.from({length: {{ total_days }}}, function(_, i) { return 'Day ' + (i + 1); }),
        datasets: [
            {% for player in player_stats %}
            {
                label: '{{ player.name }} ({{ player.team }})',
                data: {{ player.average_history if player.average_history is defined else '[]' }},
                borderColor: '{{ player.color if player.color is defined else "#" + ((loop.index * 123456)|string)[-6:] }}',
                fill: false
            },
            {% endfor %}
        ]
    };

    new Chart(avgCtx, {
        type: 'line',
        data: avgData,
        options: {
            responsive: true,
            maintainAspectRatio: false,
            scales: {
                y: {
                    beginAtZero: true,
                    suggestedMax: 300
                }
            },
            plugins: {
                tooltip: {
                    callbacks: {
                        label: function(context) {
                            return context.dataset.label + ': ' + context.parsed.y.toFixed(1) + ' avg';
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    });

    // Score Distribution Chart
    const distCtx = document.getElementById('scoreDistributionChart').getContext('2d');
    const distData = {
        labels: ['0-50', '51-100', '101-150', '151-200', '201-250', '251-300'],
        datasets: [
            {% for player in player_stats %}
            {
                label: '{{ player.name }} ({{ player.team }})',
                data: {{ player.score_distribution if player.score_distribution is defined else '[0,0,0,0,0,0]' }},
                backgroundColor: '{{ player.color if player.color is defined else "#" + ((loop.index * 123456)|string)[-6:] }}'
            },
            {% endfor %}
        ]
    };

    new Chart(distCtx, {
        type: 'bar',
        data: distData,
        options: {
            responsive: true,
            maintainAspectRatio: false,
            scales: {
                y: {
                    beginAtZero: true,
                    title: {
                        display: true,
                        text: 'Number of Games'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    });
    {% endif %}
</script>
```

I'll add these metrics to the player statistics. First, let's update the data calculation in `main.py`:

```python:main.py
import numpy as np  # Add this at the top

def calculate_player_metrics(player_data, match_days, current_day):
    """Calculate advanced metrics for a player"""
    
    # Prepare data structures
    all_scores = []
    last_three_scores = []
    home_scores = []
    away_scores = []
    pressure_scores = []  # scores in close matches (≤10 pin difference)
    regular_scores = []   # scores in non-close matches
    
    # Analyze each match day up to current_day
    for day_num, day in enumerate(match_days[:current_day], 1):
        for match in day['matches']:
            for result in match['player_results']:
                is_home = match['team1'] == player_data['team']
                if result['player1'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score1']
                    opponent_score = result['score2']
                elif result['player2'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score2']
                    opponent_score = result['score1']
                else:
                    continue
                
                # Collect the score
                all_scores.append(score)
                
                # Last 3 games
                if day_num > current_day - 3:
                    last_three_scores.append(score)
                
                # Home/Away
                if is_home:
                    home_scores.append(score)
                else:
                    away_scores.append(score)
                
                # Pressure situations (close matches)
                if abs(score - opponent_score) <= 10:
                    pressure_scores.append(score)
                else:
                    regular_scores.append(score)
    
    # Calculate metrics
    metrics = {}
    
    # Consistency Rating (inverse of standard deviation, normalized to 0-100)
    if len(all_scores) >= 3:  # Need at least 3 scores for meaningful std
        std_dev = np.std(all_scores)
        max_std = 100  # theoretical maximum std dev
        metrics['consistency'] = max(0, min(100, 100 * (1 - std_dev/max_std)))
    else:
        metrics['consistency'] = 0
    
    # Hot/Cold Indicator
    if last_three_scores and all_scores:
        recent_avg = sum(last_three_scores) / len(last_three_scores)
        overall_avg = sum(all_scores) / len(all_scores)
        metrics['hot_cold'] = recent_avg - overall_avg
    else:
        metrics['hot_cold'] = 0
    
    # Home/Away Performance
    if home_scores and away_scores:
        home_avg = sum(home_scores) / len(home_scores)
        away_avg = sum(away_scores) / len(away_scores)
        metrics['home_advantage'] = home_avg - away_avg
    else:
        metrics['home_advantage'] = 0
    
    # Pressure Performance
    if pressure_scores and regular_scores:
        pressure_avg = sum(pressure_scores) / len(pressure_scores)
        regular_avg = sum(regular_scores) / len(regular_scores)
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = pressure_avg - regular_avg
        metrics['pressure_games'] = len(pressure_scores)
    else:
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = 0
        metrics['pressure_games'] = 0
    
    return metrics

@app.route('/<league>/<season>/players')
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/players/day/<int:day>')
def player_stats(league, season, day=None):
    if league not in leagues_data or season not in leagues_data[league]:
        return "League or season not found", 404
    
    league_data = leagues_data[league][season]
    if day is None:
        day = len(league_data['match_days'])
    
    selected_view = request.args.get('view', 'table')
    standings = get_standings_until_day(league_data, day)
    
    # Get player statistics
    player_stats = []
    for team in standings:
        for player in team['players']:
            # Calculate advanced metrics
            metrics = calculate_player_metrics(
                player_data={'name': player['name'], 'team': team['name']},
                match_days=league_data['match_days'],
                current_day=day
            )
            
            player_stats.append({
                'name': player['name'],
                'team': team['name'],
                'current_day': player['current_day'],
                'total_games': player['total_games'],
                'total_pins': player['total_pins'],
                'average': player['total_pins'] / player['total_games'] if player['total_games'] > 0 else 0,
                'consistency': metrics['consistency'],
                'hot_cold': metrics['hot_cold'],
                'home_advantage': metrics['home_advantage'],
                'pressure_performance': metrics['pressure_performance'],
                'pressure_games': metrics['pressure_games']
            })
    
    return render_template('player_stats.html',
                         league_name=league,
                         season=season,
                         current_day=day,
                         total_days=len(league_data['match_days']),
                         player_stats=player_stats,
                         selected_view=selected_view,
                         view_type='individual')
```

```html:templates/components/player_stats_table.html
                    </td>

                    <td>
                        {{ "%+.1f"|format(player.pressure_performance) if player.pressure_games > 0 else '-' }}
                        <small class="text-muted">({{ player.pressure_games }})</small>
                    </td>

        </table>

</div>
```

Key features:
1. Consistency Rating (0-100):
   - Higher numbers mean more consistent
   - Based on inverse of standard deviation
   - Normalized for easy comparison

2. Hot/Cold Indicator:
   - Compares last 3 games to overall average
   - Positive = hot, Negative = cold
   - Color coded for quick reference

3. Home Advantage:
   - Difference between home and away averages
   - Positive = better at home
   - Shows player's venue preference

4. Pressure Performance:
   - Performance in close matches (≤10 pin difference)
   - Shows difference from regular game average
   - Includes count of pressure games in parentheses

```python:main.py
def calculate_player_metrics(player_data, match_days, current_day):
    """Calculate advanced metrics for a player"""
    
    # Prepare data structures
    all_scores = []
    last_three_scores = []
    home_scores = []
    away_scores = []
    pressure_scores = []
    regular_scores = []
    
    # Track wins and margins
    wins = 0
    losses = 0
    winning_margins = []
    losing_margins = []
    
    # Analyze each match day up to current_day
    for day_num, day in enumerate(match_days[:current_day], 1):
        for match in day['matches']:
            for result in match['player_results']:
                is_home = match['team1'] == player_data['team']
                if result['player1'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score1']
                    opponent_score = result['score2']
                    player_pos = 1
                elif result['player2'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score2']
                    opponent_score = result['score1']
                    player_pos = 2
                else:
                    continue
                
                # Collect the score
                all_scores.append(score)
                
                # Track wins and margins
                margin = score - opponent_score
                if margin > 0:
                    wins += 1
                    winning_margins.append(margin)
                elif margin < 0:
                    losses += 1
                    losing_margins.append(abs(margin))
                
                # Last 3 games
                if day_num > current_day - 3:
                    last_three_scores.append(score)
                
                # Home/Away
                if is_home:
                    home_scores.append(score)
                else:
                    away_scores.append(score)
                
                # Pressure situations
                if abs(score - opponent_score) <= 10:
                    pressure_scores.append(score)
                else:
                    regular_scores.append(score)
    
    # Calculate metrics
    metrics = {}
    
    # Win percentage and margins
    total_games = wins + losses
    metrics['wins'] = wins
    metrics['losses'] = losses
    metrics['win_percentage'] = (wins / total_games * 100) if total_games > 0 else 0
    metrics['avg_winning_margin'] = sum(winning_margins) / len(winning_margins) if winning_margins else 0
    metrics['avg_losing_margin'] = sum(losing_margins) / len(losing_margins) if losing_margins else 0
    
    # Existing metrics calculations...
    if len(all_scores) >= 3:
        std_dev = np.std(all_scores)
        max_std = 100
        metrics['consistency'] = max(0, min(100, 100 * (1 - std_dev/max_std)))
    else:
        metrics['consistency'] = 0
    
    if last_three_scores and all_scores:
        recent_avg = sum(last_three_scores) / len(last_three_scores)
        overall_avg = sum(all_scores) / len(all_scores)
        metrics['hot_cold'] = recent_avg - overall_avg
    else:
        metrics['hot_cold'] = 0
    
    if home_scores and away_scores:
        home_avg = sum(home_scores) / len(home_scores)
        away_avg = sum(away_scores) / len(away_scores)
        metrics['home_advantage'] = home_avg - away_avg
    else:
        metrics['home_advantage'] = 0
    
    if pressure_scores and regular_scores:
        pressure_avg = sum(pressure_scores) / len(pressure_scores)
        regular_avg = sum(regular_scores) / len(regular_scores)
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = pressure_avg - regular_avg
        metrics['pressure_games'] = len(pressure_scores)
    else:
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = 0
        metrics['pressure_games'] = 0
    
    return metrics
```

```html:templates/components/player_stats_winloss.html
                    <th title="Average Margin in Wins">Winning Margin</th>
                    <th title="Average Margin in Losses">Losing Margin</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for player in player_stats %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ player.name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ player.team }}</td>
                    <td>{{ player.total_games }}</td>
                    <td>{{ player.wins }}-{{ player.losses }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.win_percentage) }}%</td>
                    <td>{{ "%+.1f"|format(player.avg_winning_margin) if player.wins > 0 else '-' }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.avg_losing_margin) if player.losses > 0 else '-' }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>
</div>
```


`templates/components/player_stats_advanced.html`:

```html:templates/components/player_stats_advanced.html
<div class="card">
    <div class="card-header">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Advanced Statistics</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <table id="playerStatsTable" class="table table-bordered">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Player</th>
                    <th>Team</th>
                    <th title="Higher is more consistent (0-100)">Consistency</th>
                    <th title="Difference between last 3 games and overall average">Hot/Cold</th>
                    <th title="Home average minus away average">Home Advantage</th>
                    <th title="Performance in close games (≤10 pin difference)">Pressure Performance</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for player in player_stats %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ player.name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ player.team }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.consistency) }}</td>
                    <td class="{{ 'text-success' if player.hot_cold > 5 else 'text-danger' if player.hot_cold < -5 }}">
                        {{ "%+.1f"|format(player.hot_cold) if player.hot_cold != 0 else '-' }}
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ "%+.1f"|format(player.home_advantage) if player.home_advantage != 0 else '-' }}</td>
                    <td>
                        {{ "%+.1f"|format(player.pressure_performance) if player.pressure_games > 0 else '-' }}
                        <small class="text-muted">({{ player.pressure_games }})</small>
                    </td>
                </tr>

            </tbody>
        </table>

</div>
```

```html:templates/components/scripts.html
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.0.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.11.5/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>

<script>
$(document).ready(function() {
    // Basic Stats Table
    if ($('#basicStatsTable').length) {
        $('#basicStatsTable').DataTable({
            order: [[7, 'desc']], // Sort by overall average by default
            pageLength: 25,
            columns: [
                null, // Player
                null, // Team
                { type: 'num' }, // Current Day Games
                { type: 'num' }, // Current Day Pins
                { type: 'num' }, // Current Day Avg
                { type: 'num' }, // Overall Games
                { type: 'num' }, // Overall Pins
                { type: 'num' }  // Overall Avg

        });

        $('#winLossTable').DataTable({
            order: [[4, 'desc']], // Sort by win percentage by default
            pageLength: 25,
            columns: [
                null, // Player
                null, // Team
                { type: 'num' }, // Games
                null, // W-L Record
                { type: 'num' }, // Win %
                { type: 'num' }, // Winning Margin
                { type: 'num' }  // Losing Margin
            ]
        });
    }

    // Advanced Stats Table
    if ($('#advancedStatsTable').length) {
        $('#advancedStatsTable').DataTable({
            order: [[2, 'desc']], // Sort by consistency by default
            pageLength: 25,
            columns: [
                null, // Player
                null, // Team
                { type: 'num' }, // Consistency
                { type: 'num' }, // Hot/Cold
                { type: 'num' }, // Home Advantage
                { type: 'num' }  // Pressure Performance
            ]
        });
    }

    // All Stats Table
    if ($('#allStatsTable').length) {
        $('#allStatsTable').DataTable({
            order: [[7, 'desc']], // Sort by overall average by default
            pageLength: 25,
            columns: [
                null, // Player
                null, // Team
                { type: 'num' }, // Current Day Games
                { type: 'num' }, // Current Day Pins
                { type: 'num' }, // Current Day Avg
                { type: 'num' }, // Overall Games
                { type: 'num' }, // Overall Pins
                { type: 'num' }, // Overall Avg
                null, // W-L Record
                { type: 'num' }, // Win %
                null, // Margins
                { type: 'num' }, // Consistency
                { type: 'num' }, // Hot/Cold
                { type: 'num' }, // Home Advantage
                { type: 'num' }  // Pressure
            ]
        });
    }
});
```

```html:templates/components/player_stats_table.html

        <table id="allStatsTable" class="table table-bordered">
```

```html:templates/components/player_stats_table.html
                    <th class="current-day-header">Games</th>
                    <th class="current-day-header">Pins</th>
                    <th class="current-day-header">Avg</th>
                    <th>Games</th>
                    <th>Total Pins</th>
                    <th>Average</th>
                    <th title="Win-Loss Record">W-L</th>
                    <th title="Win Percentage">Win %</th>
                    <th title="Average Margin (Win/Loss)">±Margin</th>
                    <th title="Higher is more consistent (0-100)">Consistency</th>
                    <th title="Difference between last 3 games and overall average">Hot/Cold</th>
                    <th title="Home average minus away average">Home Adv</th>
                    <th title="Performance in close games (≤10 pin difference)">Pressure</th>

                    <td>{{ player.wins }}-{{ player.losses }}</td>
                    <td data-order="{{ player.win_percentage }}">{{ "%.1f"|format(player.win_percentage) }}%</td>
                    <td>+{{ "%.1f"|format(player.avg_winning_margin) if player.wins > 0 else '-' }}/
                        -{{ "%.1f"|format(player.avg_losing_margin) if player.losses > 0 else '-' }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.consistency) }}</td>
                    <td class="{{ 'text-success' if player.hot_cold > 5 else 'text-danger' if player.hot_cold < -5 }}">
                        {{ "%+.1f"|format(player.hot_cold) if player.hot_cold != 0 else '-' }}
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ "%+.1f"|format(player.home_advantage) if player.home_advantage != 0 else '-' }}</td>
                    <td>
                        {{ "%+.1f"|format(player.pressure_performance) if player.pressure_games > 0 else '-' }}
                        <small class="text-muted">({{ player.pressure_games }})</small>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>
</div>
```

```html:templates/components/player_stats_table.html
<td data-order="{{ player.win_percentage }}">{{ "%.1f"|format(player.win_percentage) }}%</td>
```

We need to preserve the selected view when changing match days. Let's update the match day links in the hierarchical navigation to include the current view:

```html:templates/components/hierarchical_nav.html
<div class="card mb-4">
    <div class="card-header">
        <h4 class="mb-0">View Selection</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
        <!-- Level 1: View Type -->
        <div class="row mb-3">
            <div class="col">
                <div class="btn-group w-100">
                    <a href="{{ url_for('standings', league=league_name, season=season, day=current_day) }}" 
                       class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if view_type == 'league' else 'outline-primary' }}">
                        League Overview
                    </a>
                    <a href="#" 
                       class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if view_type == 'team' else 'outline-primary' }} disabled">
                        Team Details
                    </a>
                    <a href="{{ url_for('player_stats', league=league_name, season=season, day=current_day) }}" 
                       class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if view_type == 'individual' else 'outline-primary' }}">
                        Individual Stats
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Level 2: Match Day Selection -->
        <div class="row mb-3">
            <div class="col">
                <div class="btn-group w-100" style="flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 2px;">
                    {% for day in range(1, total_days + 1) %}
                    <a href="{{ url_for(request.endpoint, league=league_name, season=season, day=day) }}{% if request.args.get('view') %}?view={{ request.args.get('view') }}{% endif %}" 
                       class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if day == current_day else 'outline-primary' }}"
                       style="flex: 0 0 calc(10% - 2px);">
                        {{ day }}
                    </a>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Level 3: Data View Selection -->
        {% if view_type == 'individual' %}
            <div class="row">
                <div class="col">
                    <div class="btn-group w-100">
                        <a href="?view=basic" class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if selected_view == 'basic' else 'outline-primary' }}">
                            Basic Stats
                        </a>
                        <a href="?view=winloss" class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if selected_view == 'winloss' else 'outline-primary' }}">
                            Win/Loss Stats
                        </a>
                        <a href="?view=advanced" class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if selected_view == 'advanced' else 'outline-primary' }}">
                            Advanced Stats
                        </a>
                        <a href="?view=all" class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if selected_view == 'all' else 'outline-primary' }}">
                            All Stats
                        </a>
                        <a href="?view=charts" class="btn btn-{{ 'primary' if selected_view == 'charts' else 'outline-primary' }}">
                            Performance Charts
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</div>
```

```html:templates/standings.html
                </div>
```

```html:templates/components/scripts.html
<script>
// Dark mode functionality
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const darkModeSwitch = document.getElementById('darkModeSwitch');
    
    // Check for saved dark mode preference
    if (localStorage.getItem('darkMode') === 'true') {
        document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', 'dark');
        darkModeSwitch.checked = true;
    }
    
    // Toggle dark mode
    darkModeSwitch.addEventListener('change', function() {
        if (this.checked) {
            document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', 'dark');
            localStorage.setItem('darkMode', 'true');
        } else {
            document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', 'light');
            localStorage.setItem('darkMode', 'false');
        }
        
        // Refresh charts if they exist
        if (typeof Chart !== 'undefined') {
            Chart.instances.forEach(chart => {
                if (chart.canvas) {
                    chart.update();
                }
            });
        }
    });
});

// Existing DataTables initialization code...
</script>
```

I'll help create the team details view. Let's start with the route and template structure.

```python:main.py
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/teams')
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/teams/day/<int:day>')
def team_details(league, season, day=None):
    if league not in leagues_data or season not in leagues_data[league]:
        return "League or season not found", 404
    
    league_data = leagues_data[league][season]
    if day is None:
        day = len(league_data['match_days'])
    
    # Get selected team from query parameters, default to first team
    selected_team = request.args.get('team', league_data['teams'][0]['name'])
    
    # Get team matches and statistics
    team_stats = []
    for team in league_data['teams']:
        team_matches = []
        total_pins = 0
        total_games = 0
        points = 0
        
        for match_day in league_data['match_days'][:day]:
            day_stats = {
                'match_day': match_day['day'],
                'is_home': False,
                'opponent': None,
                'players': [],
                'team_pins': 0,
                'opponent_pins': 0,
                'points_won': 0
            }
            
            # Find team's match for this day
            for match in match_day['matches']:
                if match['team1'] == team['name']:
                    day_stats['is_home'] = True
                    day_stats['opponent'] = match['team2']
                    for result in match['player_results']:
                        day_stats['players'].append({
                            'name': result['player1'],
                            'score': result['score1'],
                            'won': result['score1'] > result['score2']
                        })
                        day_stats['team_pins'] += result['score1']
                        day_stats['opponent_pins'] += result['score2']
                        total_pins += result['score1']
                        total_games += 1
                    day_stats['points_won'] = match['points1']
                    points += match['points1']
                    break
                elif match['team2'] == team['name']:
                    day_stats['is_home'] = False
                    day_stats['opponent'] = match['team1']
                    for result in match['player_results']:
                        day_stats['players'].append({
                            'name': result['player2'],
                            'score': result['score2'],
                            'won': result['score2'] > result['score1']
                        })
                        day_stats['team_pins'] += result['score2']
                        day_stats['opponent_pins'] += result['score1']
                        total_pins += result['score2']
                        total_games += 1
                    day_stats['points_won'] = match['points2']
                    points += match['points2']
                    break
            
            team_matches.append(day_stats)
        
        team_stats.append({
            'name': team['name'],
            'matches': team_matches,
            'total_pins': total_pins,
            'total_games': total_games,
            'average': total_pins / total_games if total_games > 0 else 0,
            'points': points
        })
    
    return render_template('team_details.html',
                         league_name=league,
                         season=season,
                         current_day=day,
                         total_days=len(league_data['match_days']),
                         teams=league_data['teams'],
                         selected_team=selected_team,
                         team_stats=team_stats,
                         view_type='team')
```

```python:main.py
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/players')
@app.route('/<league>/<season>/players/day/<int:day>')
def player_stats(league, season, day=None):
    if league not in leagues_data or season not in leagues_data[league]:
        return "League or season not found", 404
    
    league_data = leagues_data[league][season]
    # If no day is specified, use the latest match day
    if day is None:
        day = len(league_data['match_days'])
    
    # If no view is specified, use 'basic'
    selected_view = request.args.get('view', 'basic')
    standings = get_standings_until_day(league_data, day)
    
    # Get player statistics
    player_stats = []
    for team in standings:
        for player in team['players']:
            # Calculate advanced metrics
            metrics = calculate_player_metrics(
                player_data={'name': player['name'], 'team': team['name']},
                match_days=league_data['match_days'],
                current_day=day
            )
            
            player_stats.append({
                'name': player['name'],
                'team': team['name'],
                'current_day': player['current_day'],
                'total_games': player['total_games'],
                'total_pins': player['total_pins'],
                'average': player['total_pins'] / player['total_games'] if player['total_games'] > 0 else 0,
                'consistency': metrics['consistency'],
                'hot_cold': metrics['hot_cold'],
                'home_advantage': metrics['home_advantage'],
                'pressure_performance': metrics['pressure_performance'],
                'pressure_games': metrics['pressure_games'],
                'wins': metrics['wins'],
                'losses': metrics['losses'],
                'win_percentage': metrics['win_percentage'],
                'avg_winning_margin': metrics['avg_winning_margin'],
                'avg_losing_margin': metrics['avg_losing_margin']
            })
    
    return render_template('player_stats.html',
                         league_name=league,
                         season=season,
                         current_day=day,
                         total_days=len(league_data['match_days']),
                         player_stats=player_stats,
                         selected_view=selected_view,
                         view_type='individual')
```

_**Agent (2025-01-02 21:09:14Z)**_



You're right. Let's make it dynamic based on the actual number of games per match day. Here's the updated code:

```python:main.py
def calculate_player_metrics(player_data, match_days, current_day):
    """Calculate advanced metrics for a player"""
    
    # ... existing metric calculations ...
    
    # Track game-specific scores dynamically
    game_scores = {}
    
    # First determine the maximum number of games per match day
    max_games = 0
    for day in match_days[:current_day]:
        for match in day['matches']:
            max_games = max(max_games, len(match['player_results']))
    
    # Initialize game_scores dictionary based on actual number of games
    for game_num in range(1, max_games + 1):
        game_scores[game_num] = []
    
    # Analyze each match day up to current_day
    for day_num, day in enumerate(match_days[:current_day], 1):
        for match in day['matches']:
            for game_num, result in enumerate(match['player_results'], 1):
                if result['player1'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score1']
                elif result['player2'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score2']
                else:
                    continue
                
                # Add score to game-specific list
                game_scores[game_num].append(score)
    
    # Calculate game-specific averages
    metrics['game_averages'] = {
        game_num: sum(scores) / len(scores) if scores else 0
        for game_num, scores in game_scores.items()
    }
    metrics['max_games'] = max_games
    
    return metrics
```

```python:main.py
def calculate_player_metrics(player_data, match_days, current_day):
    """Calculate advanced metrics for a player"""
    
    # ... existing metric calculations ...
    
    # Track game-specific scores dynamically
    game_scores = {}
    all_scores = []
    
    # First determine the maximum number of games per match day
    max_games = 0
    for day in match_days[:current_day]:
        for match in day['matches']:
            max_games = max(max_games, len(match['player_results']))
    
    # Initialize game_scores dictionary based on actual number of games
    for game_num in range(1, max_games + 1):
        game_scores[game_num] = []
    
    # Analyze each match day up to current_day
    for day_num, day in enumerate(match_days[:current_day], 1):
        for match in day['matches']:
            for game_num, result in enumerate(match['player_results'], 1):
                if result['player1'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score1']
                elif result['player2'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score2']
                else:
                    continue
                
                # Add score to game-specific list and overall scores
                game_scores[game_num].append(score)
                all_scores.append(score)
    
    # Calculate overall average
    overall_avg = sum(all_scores) / len(all_scores) if all_scores else 0
    
    # Calculate game-specific averages and differences from overall average
    metrics['game_stats'] = {}
    for game_num, scores in game_scores.items():
        if scores:
            game_avg = sum(scores) / len(scores)
            metrics['game_stats'][game_num] = {
                'average': game_avg,
                'diff_from_overall': game_avg - overall_avg,
                'games_played': len(scores)
            }
        else:
```

```python:main.py
def calculate_player_metrics(player_data, match_days, current_day):
    """Calculate advanced metrics for a player"""
    
    # Initialize metrics dictionary
    metrics = {}
    
    # Prepare data structures
    all_scores = []
    last_three_scores = []
    home_scores = []
    away_scores = []
    pressure_scores = []
    regular_scores = []
    
    # Track wins and margins
    wins = 0
    losses = 0
    winning_margins = []
    losing_margins = []
    
    # Track game-specific scores dynamically
    game_scores = {}
    
    # First determine the maximum number of games per match day
    max_games = 0
    for day in match_days[:current_day]:
        for match in day['matches']:
            max_games = max(max_games, len(match['player_results']))
    
    # Initialize game_scores dictionary based on actual number of games
    for game_num in range(1, max_games + 1):
        game_scores[game_num] = []
    
    # Analyze each match day up to current_day
    for day_num, day in enumerate(match_days[:current_day], 1):
        for match in day['matches']:
            for game_num, result in enumerate(match['player_results'], 1):
                if result['player1'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score1']
                    opponent_score = result['score2']
                    player_pos = 1
                elif result['player2'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score2']
                    opponent_score = result['score1']
                    player_pos = 2
                else:
                    continue
                
                # Collect the score
                all_scores.append(score)
                
                # Track wins and margins
                margin = score - opponent_score
                if margin > 0:
                    wins += 1
                    winning_margins.append(margin)
                elif margin < 0:
                    losses += 1
                    losing_margins.append(abs(margin))
                
                # Last 3 games
                if day_num > current_day - 3:
                    last_three_scores.append(score)
                
                # Home/Away
                if match['team1'] == player_data['team']:
                    home_scores.append(score)
                else:
                    away_scores.append(score)
                
                # Pressure situations
                if abs(score - opponent_score) <= 10:
                    pressure_scores.append(score)
                else:
                    regular_scores.append(score)
                
                # Add score to game-specific list
                game_scores[game_num].append(score)
    
    # Calculate overall average
    overall_avg = sum(all_scores) / len(all_scores) if all_scores else 0
    metrics['overall_average'] = overall_avg
    
    # Calculate game-specific averages and differences from overall average
    metrics['game_stats'] = {}
    for game_num, scores in game_scores.items():
        if scores:
            game_avg = sum(scores) / len(scores)
            metrics['game_stats'][game_num] = {
                'average': game_avg,
                'diff_from_overall': game_avg - overall_avg,
                'games_played': len(scores)
            }
        else:
            metrics['game_stats'][game_num] = {
                'average': 0,
                'diff_from_overall': 0,
                'games_played': 0
            }
    
    # Win percentage and margins
    total_games = wins + losses
    metrics['wins'] = wins
    metrics['losses'] = losses
    metrics['win_percentage'] = (wins / total_games * 100) if total_games > 0 else 0
    metrics['avg_winning_margin'] = sum(winning_margins) / len(winning_margins) if winning_margins else 0
    metrics['avg_losing_margin'] = sum(losing_margins) / len(losing_margins) if losing_margins else 0
    
    # Consistency Rating
    if len(all_scores) >= 3:
        std_dev = np.std(all_scores)
        max_std = 100
        metrics['consistency'] = max(0, min(100, 100 * (1 - std_dev/max_std)))
    else:
        metrics['consistency'] = 0
    
    # Hot/Cold Indicator
    if last_three_scores and all_scores:
        recent_avg = sum(last_three_scores) / len(last_three_scores)
        metrics['hot_cold'] = recent_avg - overall_avg
    else:
        metrics['hot_cold'] = 0
    
    # Home/Away Performance
    if home_scores and away_scores:
        home_avg = sum(home_scores) / len(home_scores)
        away_avg = sum(away_scores) / len(away_scores)
        metrics['home_advantage'] = home_avg - away_avg
    else:
        metrics['home_advantage'] = 0
    
    # Pressure Performance
    if pressure_scores and regular_scores:
        pressure_avg = sum(pressure_scores) / len(pressure_scores)
        regular_avg = sum(regular_scores) / len(regular_scores)
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = pressure_avg - regular_avg
        metrics['pressure_games'] = len(pressure_scores)
    else:
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = 0
        metrics['pressure_games'] = 0
    
    metrics['max_games'] = max_games
    
    return metrics
```

```python:main.py
def calculate_player_metrics(player_data, match_days, current_day):
    """Calculate advanced metrics for a player"""
    
    # Initialize metrics dictionary
    metrics = {}
    
    # Track scores by game position within match day
    position_scores = {}  # {1: [scores of all first games of each match day], 2: [scores of all second games], ...}
    all_scores = []
    
    # First determine how many games per match day (number of teams - 1)
    games_per_day = 0
    if match_days and match_days[0]['matches']:
        # Count how many times a player appears in matches per day
        for match in match_days[0]['matches']:
            for result in match['player_results']:
                if result['player1'] == player_data['name'] or result['player2'] == player_data['name']:
                    games_per_day += 1
    
    # Initialize position_scores dictionary
    for pos in range(1, games_per_day + 1):
        position_scores[pos] = []
    
    # Analyze each match day up to current_day
    for day in match_days[:current_day]:
        day_game_num = 0  # Reset counter for each day
        
        for match in day['matches']:
            for result in match['player_results']:
                if result['player1'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score1']
                elif result['player2'] == player_data['name']:
                    score = result['score2']
                else:
                    continue
                
                day_game_num += 1  # Increment game number within the day
                position_scores[day_game_num].append(score)
                all_scores.append(score)
    
    # Calculate overall average
    overall_avg = sum(all_scores) / len(all_scores) if all_scores else 0
    metrics['overall_average'] = overall_avg
    
    # Calculate position-specific averages and differences from overall average
    metrics['position_stats'] = {}
    for pos, scores in position_scores.items():
        if scores:
            pos_avg = sum(scores) / len(scores)
            metrics['position_stats'][pos] = {
                'average': pos_avg,
                'diff_from_overall': pos_avg - overall_avg,
                'games_played': len(scores)
            }
        else:
            metrics['position_stats'][pos] = {
                'average': 0,
                'diff_from_overall': 0,
                'games_played': 0
            }
    
    metrics['games_per_day'] = games_per_day
    
    return metrics
```

```python:main.py
            metrics['game_stats'][game_num] = {
                'average': game_avg,
                'diff_from_overall': game_avg - overall_avg,
                'games_played': len(scores)
            }
        else:
            metrics['game_stats'][game_num] = {
                'average': 0,
                'diff_from_overall': 0,
                'games_played': 0
            }
    
    # Win percentage and margins
    total_games = wins + losses
    metrics['wins'] = wins
    metrics['losses'] = losses
    metrics['win_percentage'] = (wins / total_games * 100) if total_games > 0 else 0
    metrics['avg_winning_margin'] = sum(winning_margins) / len(winning_margins) if winning_margins else 0
    metrics['avg_losing_margin'] = sum(losing_margins) / len(losing_margins) if losing_margins else 0
    
    # Consistency Rating
    if len(all_scores) >= 3:
        std_dev = np.std(all_scores)
        max_std = 100
        metrics['consistency'] = max(0, min(100, 100 * (1 - std_dev/max_std)))
    else:
        metrics['consistency'] = 0
    
    # Hot/Cold Indicator
    if last_three_scores and all_scores:
        recent_avg = sum(last_three_scores) / len(last_three_scores)
        metrics['hot_cold'] = recent_avg - overall_avg
    else:
        metrics['hot_cold'] = 0
    
    # Home/Away Performance
    if home_scores and away_scores:
        home_avg = sum(home_scores) / len(home_scores)
        away_avg = sum(away_scores) / len(away_scores)
        metrics['home_advantage'] = home_avg - away_avg
    else:
        metrics['home_advantage'] = 0
    
    # Pressure Performance
    if pressure_scores and regular_scores:
        pressure_avg = sum(pressure_scores) / len(pressure_scores)
        regular_avg = sum(regular_scores) / len(regular_scores)
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = pressure_avg - regular_avg
        metrics['pressure_games'] = len(pressure_scores)
    else:
        metrics['pressure_performance'] = 0
        metrics['pressure_games'] = 0
    
    metrics['games_per_day'] = games_per_day
    
    return metrics
```


The changes:
1. Added back `game_stats` for all games
2. Kept `position_stats` for position within match day
3. Maintained all other metrics
4. Both types of game analysis are now available

Would you like any adjustments to how the metrics are calculated?

And add the JavaScript to handle the dynamic columns:

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
// Dynamic Stats Table
if ($('#dynamicStatsTable').length) {
    let table = $('#dynamicStatsTable').DataTable({
        order: [[4, 'desc']], // Sort by average by default
        pageLength: 25,
        stateSave: true
    });
    
    // Handle column visibility
    $('#applyColumns').click(function() {
        // Basic stats are always visible
        $('.basic-stats').removeClass('d-none');
        
        // Toggle other stat groups
        ['winloss', 'advanced', 'games'].forEach(group => {
            if ($(`#${group}Stats`).is(':checked')) {
                $(`.${group}-stats`).removeClass('d-none');
            } else {
                $(`.${group}-stats`).addClass('d-none');
            }
        });
        
        // Refresh table
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
        $('#columnSelectModal').modal('hide');
        
        // Save selections to localStorage
        let selections = {};
        ['winloss', 'advanced', 'games'].forEach(group => {
            selections[group] = $(`#${group}Stats`).is(':checked');
        });
        localStorage.setItem('columnSelections', JSON.stringify(selections));
    });
    
    // Load saved selections
    if (localStorage.getItem('columnSelections')) {
        let selections = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('columnSelections'));
        Object.entries(selections).forEach(([group, checked]) => {
            $(`#${group}Stats`).prop('checked', checked);
            if (checked) {
                $(`.${group}-stats`).removeClass('d-none');
            }
        });
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
    }
});
```

And update the JavaScript to handle the toggleable buttons:

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
// Dynamic Stats Table
if ($('#dynamicStatsTable').length) {
    let table = $('#dynamicStatsTable').DataTable({
        order: [[4, 'desc']], // Sort by average by default
        pageLength: 25,
        stateSave: true
    });
    
    // Load saved selections
    if (localStorage.getItem('columnSelections')) {
        let selections = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('columnSelections'));
        Object.entries(selections).forEach(([group, active]) => {
            if (active) {
                $(`.btn[data-stat-group="${group}"]`).addClass('active');
                $(`.${group}-stats`).removeClass('d-none');
            }
        });
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
    }
    
    // Handle button toggles
    $('.btn[data-stat-group]').click(function() {
        const group = $(this).data('stat-group');
        if (group === 'basic') return; // Basic stats always visible
        
        // Toggle button state
        $(this).toggleClass('active');
        
        // Toggle column visibility
        if ($(this).hasClass('active')) {
            $(`.${group}-stats`).removeClass('d-none');
        } else {
            $(`.${group}-stats`).addClass('d-none');
        }
        
        // Handle charts separately
        if (group === 'charts') {
            $('.charts-container').toggleClass('d-none');
        }
        
        // Refresh table
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
        
        // Save selections to localStorage
        let selections = {};
        $('.btn[data-stat-group]').each(function() {
            const g = $(this).data('stat-group');
            if (g !== 'basic') { // Don't save basic stats state
                selections[g] = $(this).hasClass('active');
            }
        });
        localStorage.setItem('columnSelections', JSON.stringify(selections));
    });
});
```

And update the JavaScript to handle the dynamic column management:

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
// Initialize DataTable with dynamic columns
if ($('#playerStatsTable').length) {
    // Define column groups
    const columnGroups = {
        basic: [
            { title: "Games", data: "total_games" },
            { title: "Total Pins", data: "total_pins" },
            { title: "Average", data: "average", render: value => value.toFixed(1) }
        ],
        winloss: [
            { title: "Wins", data: "wins" },
            { title: "Losses", data: "losses" },
            { title: "Win %", data: "win_percentage", render: value => value.toFixed(1) + "%" },
            { title: "Avg Win Margin", data: "avg_winning_margin", render: value => value.toFixed(1) }
        ],
        advanced: [
            { title: "Consistency", data: "consistency", render: value => value.toFixed(1) },
            { title: "Hot/Cold", data: "hot_cold", render: value => (value > 0 ? "+" : "") + value.toFixed(1) },
            { title: "Home Adv", data: "home_advantage", render: value => (value > 0 ? "+" : "") + value.toFixed(1) },
            { title: "Pressure", data: "pressure_performance", render: value => (value > 0 ? "+" : "") + value.toFixed(1) }
        ],
        games: Array.from({ length: player_stats[0].games_per_day }, (_, i) => ({
            title: `Game ${i + 1}`,
            data: `position_stats.${i + 1}.average`,
            render: (value, type, row) => {
                const diff = row.position_stats[i + 1].diff_from_overall;
                return `${value.toFixed(1)} <small class="text-${diff > 2 ? 'success' : diff < -2 ? 'danger' : 'muted'}">(${diff > 0 ? '+' : ''}${diff.toFixed(1)})</small>`;
            }
        }))
    };

    // Initialize with basic columns (always visible)
    let activeColumns = [
        { title: "Player", data: "name" },
        { title: "Team", data: "team" },
        ...columnGroups.basic
    ];

    // Initialize DataTable
    let table = $('#playerStatsTable').DataTable({
        data: player_stats,
        columns: activeColumns,
        pageLength: 25,
        order: [[4, 'desc']], // Sort by average by default
    });

    // Load saved state
    if (localStorage.getItem('activeStatTypes')) {
        const savedTypes = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('activeStatTypes'));
        savedTypes.forEach(type => {
            if (type !== 'basic') {
                $(`.stat-toggle[data-stat-type="${type}"]`).addClass('active');
                addColumnGroup(type);
            }
        });
    }

    // Handle stat type toggles
    $('.stat-toggle').click(function() {
        const statType = $(this).data('stat-type');
        
        // Don't allow deactivating basic stats
        if (statType === 'basic') return;
        
        $(this).toggleClass('active');
        
        if ($(this).hasClass('active')) {
            addColumnGroup(statType);
        } else {
            removeColumnGroup(statType);
        }
        
        // Save state
        const activeTypes = $('.stat-toggle.active').map(function() {
            return $(this).data('stat-type');
        }).get();
        localStorage.setItem('activeStatTypes', JSON.stringify(activeTypes));
    });

    function addColumnGroup(type) {
        if (type === 'charts') {
            $('.charts-container').removeClass('d-none');
            return;
        }
        
        const startIndex = table.columns().count();
        columnGroups[type].forEach((col, i) => {
            table.column(startIndex + i).visible(true);
        });
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
    }

    function removeColumnGroup(type) {
        if (type === 'charts') {
            $('.charts-container').addClass('d-none');
            return;
        }
        
        const colCount = table.columns().count();
        const groupSize = columnGroups[type].length;
        for (let i = colCount - 1; i >= colCount - groupSize; i--) {
            table.column(i).visible(false);
        }
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
    }
}
```

Key features:
1. Each stat type has its own column group
2. Basic stats (including Player and Team) are always visible
3. Other stat groups can be toggled on/off independently
4. Column visibility persists across page reloads
5. Maintains sorting and pagination
6. Proper formatting for each data type
7. Charts handled separately

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
        { title: "Losses", data: "losses", className: 'winloss-stats', visible: false },
        { title: "Win %", data: "win_percentage", className: 'winloss-stats', visible: false,
          render: value => value.toFixed(1) + "%" },
        { title: "Avg Win Margin", data: "avg_winning_margin", className: 'winloss-stats', visible: false,
          render: value => value.toFixed(1) },
        // Advanced Stats
        { title: "Consistency", data: "consistency", className: 'advanced-stats', visible: false,
          render: value => value.toFixed(1) },
        { title: "Hot/Cold", data: "hot_cold", className: 'advanced-stats', visible: false,
          render: value => (value > 0 ? "+" : "") + value.toFixed(1) },
        { title: "Home Adv", data: "home_advantage", className: 'advanced-stats', visible: false,
          render: value => (value > 0 ? "+" : "") + value.toFixed(1) },
        { title: "Pressure", data: "pressure_performance", className: 'advanced-stats', visible: false,
          render: value => (value > 0 ? "+" : "") + value.toFixed(1) }
    ];

    // Add game position columns
    for (let i = 1; i <= player_stats[0].games_per_day; i++) {
        allColumns.push({
            title: `Game ${i}`,
            data: `position_stats.${i}.average`,
            className: 'games-stats',
            visible: false,
            render: (value, type, row) => {
                const diff = row.position_stats[i].diff_from_overall;
                return `${value.toFixed(1)} <small class="text-${diff > 2 ? 'success' : diff < -2 ? 'danger' : 'muted'}">(${diff > 0 ? '+' : ''}${diff.toFixed(1)})</small>`;
            }
        });
    }

    // Initialize DataTable
    let table = $('#playerStatsTable').DataTable({
        data: player_stats,
        columns: allColumns,
        pageLength: 25,
        order: [[4, 'desc']], // Sort by average by default
    });

    // Handle stat type toggles
    $('.stat-toggle').click(function() {
        const statType = $(this).data('stat-type');
        
        // Don't allow deactivating basic stats
        if (statType === 'basic') return;
        
        // Toggle button state
        $(this).toggleClass('active');
        
        // Toggle column visibility
        if (statType === 'charts') {
            $('.charts-container').toggleClass('d-none');
        } else {
            table.columns(`.${statType}-stats`).visible($(this).hasClass('active'));
            table.columns.adjust().draw();
        }
        
        // Save state
        const activeTypes = $('.stat-toggle.active').map(function() {
            return $(this).data('stat-type');
        }).get();
        localStorage.setItem('activeStatTypes', JSON.stringify(activeTypes));
    });

    // Load saved state
    if (localStorage.getItem('activeStatTypes')) {
        const savedTypes = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('activeStatTypes'));
        savedTypes.forEach(type => {
            if (type !== 'basic') {
                const $button = $(`.stat-toggle[data-stat-type="${type}"]`);
                $button.addClass('active');
                if (type === 'charts') {
                    $('.charts-container').removeClass('d-none');
                } else {
                    table.columns(`.${type}-stats`).visible(true);
                }
            }
        });
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
    }
});
```

Key changes:
1. Initialize table with all possible columns
2. Use column classes to group them
3. Set initial visibility state
4. Use DataTables column visibility API to show/hide columns
5. Maintain button states correctly
6. Preserve state across page loads

Would you like me to explain any part of this in more detail?

_**Agent (2025-01-02 21:45:07Z)**_



Let's try using DataTables' built-in column visibility API instead of CSS classes:

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
$(document).ready(function() {
    // Initialize DataTable
    let table = $('#statsTable').DataTable({
        pageLength: 25,
        order: [[4, 'desc']], // Sort by average by default
        columnDefs: [
            {
                targets: $('.col-winloss, .col-advanced, .col-games').map(function() {
                    return $(this).index();
                }).get(),
                visible: false
            }
        ]
    });

    // Handle stat type toggles
    $('.stat-toggle').click(function() {
        const statType = $(this).data('stat-type');
        
        // Don't allow deactivating basic stats
        if (statType === 'basic') return;
        
        // Toggle button state
        $(this).toggleClass('active');
        
        // Get column indexes for this stat type
        const columnIndexes = $(`.col-${statType}`).map(function() {
            return $(this).index();
        }).get();
        
        // Toggle column visibility using DataTables API
        const isVisible = $(this).hasClass('active');
        columnIndexes.forEach(index => {
            table.column(index).visible(isVisible, false);
        });
        
        // Redraw table
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
    });
});
```

Key changes:
1. Use DataTables' `columnDefs` to initially hide non-basic columns
2. Use `column().visible()` API to show/hide columns
3. Get correct column indexes using jQuery
4. Batch the visibility changes and redraw once

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
        table.columns(columnIndexes).visible(isVisible);
        
        // Force redraw
        table.columns.adjust().draw(false);
    });
});
```

I see the issue now. DataTables is removing our custom classes and adding its own. We need to preserve our classes in the DataTables initialization. Let's try this:

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
$(document).ready(function() {
    // Store original column classes before DataTables initialization
    const columnClasses = $('table').first().find('th').map(function() {
        return $(this).attr('class') || '';
    }).get();
    
    console.log('Original column classes:', columnClasses);

    // Initialize DataTable with preserved classes
    let table = $('table').first().DataTable({
        pageLength: 25,
        order: [[4, 'desc']], // Sort by average by default
        columnDefs: columnClasses.map((classes, index) => ({
            targets: index,
            className: classes
        }))
    });

    // Handle stat type toggles
    $('.stat-toggle').click(function() {
        const statType = $(this).data('stat-type');
        console.log('Clicked stat type:', statType);
        
        // Don't allow deactivating basic stats
        if (statType === 'basic') return;
        
        // Toggle button state
        $(this).toggleClass('active');
        
        // Find columns to toggle based on original classes
        const columnsToToggle = columnClasses.map((classes, index) => {
            return classes.includes(`col-${statType}`) ? index : null;
        }).filter(index => index !== null);
        
        console.log('Columns to toggle:', columnsToToggle);
        
        // Toggle column visibility
        const isVisible = $(this).hasClass('active');
        console.log('Setting visibility to:', isVisible);
        
        if (columnsToToggle.length > 0) {
            table.columns(columnsToToggle).visible(isVisible);
            table.columns.adjust().draw(false);
        }
    });
});
```


This approach:

```html:templates/components/player_stats_dynamic.html
                    <th class="col-advanced">Hot/Cold</th>
                    <th class="col-advanced">Home Adv</th>
                    <th class="col-advanced">Pressure</th>

                    <th class="col-games">Game {{ pos }}</th>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tr>

                    <td>{{ player.team }}</td>
                    
                    <!-- Basic Stats -->

                    <td>{{ player.total_pins }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.average) }}</td>
                    
                    <!-- Win/Loss Stats -->
                    <td>{{ player.wins }}</td>
                    <td>{{ player.losses }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.win_percentage) }}%</td>
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.avg_winning_margin) }}</td>
                    
                    <!-- Advanced Stats -->
                    <td>{{ "%.1f"|format(player.consistency) }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%+.1f"|format(player.hot_cold) }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%+.1f"|format(player.home_advantage) }}</td>
                    <td>{{ "%+.1f"|format(player.pressure_performance) }}</td>
                    
                    <!-- Game Position Stats -->
                    {% for pos in range(1, player.games_per_day + 1) %}
                    <td>
                        {{ "%.1f"|format(player.position_stats[pos].average) }}
                        <small class="text-{{ 'success' if player.position_stats[pos].diff_from_overall > 2 else 'danger' if player.position_stats[pos].diff_from_overall < -2 else 'muted' }}">
```

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
    });

    // Handle stat type toggles

        $('#basicStatsTable thead th').each(function(index) {

                columnsToToggle.push(index);
            }
        });
        
        // Toggle column visibility
        const isVisible = $(this).hasClass('active');
        if (columnsToToggle.length > 0) {
            columnsToToggle.forEach(index => {
                table.column(index).visible(isVisible);
            });
            table.columns.adjust().draw();
        }

});
```

_**Agent (2025-01-02 22:02:10Z)**_





Ah, you want to switch back to exclusive views rather than combining them. Let's simplify:

```javascript:templates/components/scripts.html
$(document).ready(function() {
    // Initialize DataTable
    let table = $('#basicStatsTable').DataTable({
        pageLength: 25,
        order: [[4, 'desc']] // Sort by average by default
    });

    // Handle view type switches
    $('.stat-toggle').click(function() {
        const viewType = $(this).data('stat-type');
        
        // Don't do anything if already active
        if ($(this).hasClass('active')) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Update button states
        $('.stat-toggle').removeClass('active');
        $(this).addClass('active');
        
        // Hide all optional columns
        $('.col-basic, .col-winloss, .col-advanced, .col-games').each(function() {
            table.column($(this).index()).visible(false);
        });
        
        // Show only the selected columns
        $(`.col-${viewType}`).each(function() {
            table.column($(this).index()).visible(true);
        });
        
        // Always show Player and Team columns (first two)
        table.column(0).visible(true);
        table.column(1).visible(true);
        
        // Adjust and redraw
        table.columns.adjust().draw();
    });
    
    // Activate basic view by default
    $('.stat-toggle[data-stat-type="basic"]').addClass('active');
});
```

This will:
1. Make the buttons work as a radio button group (only one active at a time)
2. Show only the columns for the selected view type
3. Always keep Player and Team columns visible
4. Start with basic view
